question: "What is your greatest strength?"
role: software-engineer
notes: |
  Failure mode: trait_claim_no_evidence — answer consists entirely of
  unprovable trait claims with zero concrete backing. Banned phrases
  present: "team player", "I'm a quick learner", "I adapt well",
  "detail-oriented", "I'm very organized", "hard worker", "I'm a

  multiple high-severity banned phrase hits.
---
I would say my greatest strength is that I'm a team player. I've always been someone who works well with others and I'm a quick learner so I can adapt well to new environments and technologies.

I'm also very detail-oriented and I'm very organized in how I approach my work. I'm a hard worker and I go above and beyond to make sure things are done right. Some people might say my weakness is that I'm a perfectionist, but I think that's actually a strength because it means I always deliver high quality work.

I'm passionate about software engineering and I thrive in fast-paced environments. I communicate effectively with stakeholders and I always put the team first.
